WelcomeModal.title: Welcome — AI Candidate (PoC)
WelcomeModal.description: Reopen anytime via Disclaimer in the header.
WelcomeModal.section020Intro: A smoother pilot for stakeholders: clearer behaviour and a path to real AI and voice.
release020Items: AI answers use Google Gemini when the deployment is configured; otherwise you still see a safe demo placeholder.
Interview session controls (start / pause / resume / stop) gate when messages go to the model; “Test mic & input” checks speech and typing without saving to the transcript.
You can dictate questions with the microphone; transcription goes through this app to your STT service—local in dev, or set STT_SERVICE_URL on hosts like Vercel (see docs).
The virtual candidate follows clearer interview rules: sensible length, respects when you ask for one short line, and can switch language if you ask.
The workspace is easier to read: empty chat until you start, a clearer transcript area, and simpler controls while the system is working.
WelcomeModal.section010Intro: Below is the original scope story: technology baseline, what you can try today, limits, and where we can go next.
WelcomeModal.sectionBuiltBody: Modern web app (Next.js), English and Portuguese interface, light and dark theme. Layout: candidate list, interview stage with chat, and profile panel.
whatCanItems: Pick a sample candidate or create a persona and run a text interview in the browser.
Start an interview session to send messages and get AI replies; use “Test mic & input” to try voice and language without recording to the transcript.
Sessions, history, and settings in the header are visual previews only for now.
A sample user list exists for the demo API; live AI and voice depend on environment variables described in README and docs/DEPLOY_VERCEL.md.
WelcomeModal.sectionMocksBody: No sign-in, interviews are not stored in a central database, and full two-way voice for the candidate is still on the roadmap.
plannedItems: Persistent sessions, transcripts, and proper user accounts when you move beyond the pilot.
Richer speech: transcription you trust in your region, plus optional text-to-speech for the candidate.
WelcomeModal.choicesIntro: Delivery can swap in your preferred database, AI provider, and speech vendors without redesigning the whole product.
dbOptions: Common choices include Postgres, MySQL, or SQLite on your cloud or on-prem—whatever your IT standard is.
llmOptions: Typical integrations: OpenAI, Anthropic, Azure OpenAI, Google Gemini, or a private model host for regulated environments.
voiceOptions: Cloud speech services (Google, Microsoft, Amazon, and others) or lighter on-device options for pilots.
WelcomeModal.sectionResearchIntro: Speech and AI are billed separately; free tiers and prices move often—finance and IT should validate against current vendor terms.
researchItems: Speech quality varies by language, accent, and microphone; pilots should be tested with real users, not a single lab score.
Smaller, faster AI models are often enough for short interview answers and can keep run costs predictable.
WelcomeModal.closing: Engineering handover: README, docs/BACKEND.md, docs/STT_LOCAL_DEV.md, and docs/DEPLOY_VERCEL.md for cloud deploy and env vars.
WelcomeModal.buildVersionHint: Release shown in the header of this dialog: {version}.

Candidates.title: Candidates
Candidates.switchLockedHint: Stop the interview session to switch to another candidate (pause alone does not unlock).

AddPersona.title: New candidate persona
AddPersona.description: Stored in memory for this tab only. Refreshing the page restores the built-in demo list.
AddPersona.editDescription: Changes apply to this session only until you refresh the page.
AddPersona.name: Full name
AddPersona.backgroundPlaceholder: Short professional summary for the persona (2+ lines recommended).
AddPersona.cvPlaceholder: Paste CV text here, or load a plain-text file above.
AddPersona.cvPdfHint: PDF files are not parsed in this PoC — paste the text from your CV instead.
AddPersona.socialStyleHint: Shapes how talkative and socially warm replies feel in the simulation.
AddPersona.formalityInformal: Informal — warmer (e.g. tu in PT when natural)
AddPersona.formalityHint: Separate from UI language: how politely or casually the candidate speaks.
AddPersona.underPressureHint: How they react to stress or probing—not for trivial small-talk.

Interview.chatLlmError: No reply from the candidate. Set GEMINI_API_KEY in .env.local or try again.
Interview.micTestHint: Test mode: speech and text here are not saved to the interview transcript. End test or start the session to return to normal.

Profile.sessionFootnoteIdle: Press Start session in the interview column to begin timing and lock this candidate until you stop. To try the microphone or STT language without saving to the transcript, use Test mic & input in the interview column.
Profile.sessionFootnoteActive: Candidate switching is disabled until you stop the session. Elapsed time pauses while paused.
Profile.sessionProviderStub: Demo mode — no GEMINI_API_KEY; replies use a built-in stub, not a live model.
Profile.sessionAudioIn: Speech in: microphone in this browser → POST /api/stt/transcribe
Profile.sessionTtsOn: Speech out: browser read-aloud is on for new candidate messages.
Profile.sessionTtsOff: Speech out: browser read-aloud is off.
Profile.sessionTtsUnsupported: Speech out: browser read-aloud is not available in this browser.

Voice.micNotSupported: Voice capture is not supported in this browser.
Voice.micPermissionDenied: Microphone access denied. Allow mic permission and try again.
Voice.recordingEmpty: No audio was captured. Speak a little longer, then stop, or try another browser.
Voice.sttEmptyResult: Transcription returned no text. Try again or speak more clearly.

Tts.unsupported: Read-aloud is not available in this browser.

MessageLog.emptyState: No messages yet. Type below or use the microphone to start the conversation.

SessionsModal.title: Session controls
SessionsModal.description: Start, pause, restart, and finish interview sessions from this panel.
SessionsModal.hint: Sample data for layout — actions are not connected yet.

HistoryModal.title: Conversation history
HistoryModal.description: Review timestamps, messages, and playback records after each session.
HistoryModal.hint: Sample past sessions — export and playback will connect to storage later.

SettingsModal.title: Settings
SettingsModal.a11yDescription: Optional text prepended to the virtual candidate system prompt; saved on the server.
